items.name_en: Small in stock!!️
items.name_cn:
Small in stock!!️
Toujours series latest autumn/winter grained leather, absolutely stunning, high-visibility large bag, very fresh color, eye-catching, effortlessly exudes a premium feel. Oversized quilted grained leather design paired with classic letter accessories, very modern and stylish. The bag structure is soft, calfskin material feels luxurious, unique clasp design allows the sides to fold when closed. Capacity is very nice, thoughtfully includes an inner pocket for small items.
size:23*15*15cm

items.name_en: Small Lady Dior Handbag
items.name_cn:
Small Lady Dior Handbag
White Calfskin Trellis
No.: M0531ONJK_M49U
This Lady Dior handbag embodies Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Crafted from white calfskin, it features a quilted texture created by trellis quilting lines, with a timeless and chic design. The brown tortoiseshell-effect resin D.I.O.R. charm complements the brand-new detachable chain shoulder strap, which alternates between light gold-finish metal links and brown tortoiseshell-effect resin O links. The small size comes with a detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing it to be carried by hand or crossbody.
Main material: Calfskin
Lining: Calfskin
Detachable O-link chain
Internal zip pocket
Can be paired with other Dior quilted shoulder straps
Includes dust bag
Made in Italy
Size: 20 x 17 x 8 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 wallet, 1 mobile phone, and sunglasses

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: Small Monogram
items.name_cn:
Small Monogram
New FENDI First is here!!
Designed by Kim Jones, this is the first FENDI bag, overturning previous shapes. Metal trim and large logo lock combined with the body design deconstructs architectural art and fashion, elegant yet cool, instantly eye-catching! Perfect for evening clutching, and crossbody gives a high-end street chic feel!
Small Size 26x9.5x18cm

items.name_en: Small Size "Export Product" 🚩🚩🚩 Top quality, price is a bit high 😯 OHANEL 🔮🔮🔮 25A Grained Handle Mailer Bag. A versatile style that is both sweet and salty, combining looks and practicality, mastering that relaxed and expensive look 🤏🏻. Grained calfskin 🐂 very durable, retro matte gold hardware. Capacity fits daily items 👍🏻. Larger than previous flap bags 😌. Has a handle for hand carrying, and a short leather chain strap, which can be worn as an accessory or on the shoulder. Size: 15.5*22*6cm/5147001180

items.name_en: Small size 👄L Classic hammock bag, free-folding zipper design, can also hold a MacBook and A4 notebook. Two small pockets on the sides, perfect for a Plus phone and important cards. If you feel it's not big enough, unzip it for massive storage! With this bag, work and travel are worry-free... Versatile styles, easy to match with any outfit, even casual wear is effortless. If you go for a ladylike style, wrap a silk scarf around the handle, and the bag becomes soft and you are perfect! A bag with a fairy-like aura, gentle and elegant is its name. Such understated elegance is a favorite for the artsy crowd. Unique style, walk your own path, those who like it should get one! Spanish calfskin, the material and feel are impeccable. Top-tier leather gets softer and more textured the more you wear it! Top-tier custom hardware, lining, imported YKK zipper, ZP craftsmanship, presented beautifully. Bring the Luo family's 'transforming little diamond' to the fashion world! Size: 29*14*26cm
